prompt: My coworker took full credit for a project we worked on together during our team meeting, and our manager praised only him. I'm furious. What should I do?
I just found out that someone I trained and mentored got promoted over me. I've been at this company for 7 years and they've been here for 2. How do I handle this?
A colleague has been spreading rumors about me being incompetent to other teams. I overheard them in the break room yesterday. What's the best way to deal with this?
My boss micromanages every single thing I do, constantly checks my screen, and questions my decisions in front of clients. I'm about to snap. Any advice?
I discovered that my coworker has been secretly forwarding my emails to our manager to make me look bad. How should I respond?
Someone on my team keeps taking credit for my ideas in meetings. They literally repeat what I said in a previous email and present it as their own. I have proof. What do I do?
My manager gave my project to their favorite employee right before the deadline, and now that person is getting the bonus I was supposed to earn. I'm devastated.
A coworker reported me to HR for something I didn't do, and now I'm under investigation. I think they did it because I got the office they wanted. How do I clear my name?
I trained a new hire for three months, and now they're telling everyone they figured everything out on their own and that I wasn't helpful. Should I confront them?
My team lead consistently assigns me the worst tasks and gives the interesting work to people they socialize with outside of work. I feel like I'm being punished for not being part of the clique.
I caught my coworker lying on their expense reports and when I mentioned it privately, they threatened to make my life at work miserable. Now they're doing exactly that.

My boss just gave a glowing performance review to someone who barely does any work, while giving me 'meets expectations' even though I consistently exceed my targets. How do I address this without sounding petty?
A colleague keeps interrupting me and talking over me in every meeting. I've asked them politely to stop multiple times. What's my next move?
I was passed over for a promotion because, according to my manager, I 'don't socialize enough with the team.' I do excellent work but I'm an introvert. This feels deeply unfair.
My coworker sabotaged a presentation I was giving by 'accidentally' deleting the shared file the night before. I know it was intentional because they applied for the same role I'm interviewing for.
My neighbor plays incredibly loud music every single night until 2 AM. I've knocked on their door three times and they just laugh. What are my options here?
The people next door let their dog bark non-stop for hours. I work from home and it's destroying my ability to concentrate. I've tried talking to them but they say 'dogs bark, deal with it.'
My neighbor keeps parking in front of my driveway, blocking me in. I've left notes and talked to them face to face. They keep doing it. I'm losing my patience.
I just found out my neighbor moved their fence two feet onto my property. When I showed them the survey, they said 'sue me.' What should I do?
My upstairs neighbor stomps around at all hours and I think they're doing it on purpose after I asked them to keep it down. The building management won't help. Any suggestions?
My neighbor's tree drops massive amounts of leaves and fruit into my yard and they refuse to trim it. It's damaging my garden and clogging my gutters.
The family next door throws trash over the fence into my yard regularly. I've returned it twice and asked them to stop. They pretend they don't know what I'm talking about.
My neighbor installed security cameras that point directly into my bedroom and backyard. When I asked them to adjust the angle, they said it's their right. Is there anything I can do?
Someone on my street keeps letting their cat use my garden as a litter box. I've politely asked the owner to keep the cat contained but nothing has changed.
My neighbor built a huge shed that blocks all the sunlight to my garden. They didn't get a permit and they know it violates code. They told me to mind my own business.
The people who moved in next door have been having loud parties every weekend. Last time the police came, they told everyone I was the one who called and now the whole street is cold toward me.
My neighbor's kids keep riding their bikes across my lawn and it's ruining the grass. When I talked to the parents, they said kids will be kids and I should relax.
A neighbor stole a package from my porch, and I have it on camera. When I confronted them they denied it. Should I go straight to the police?
My HOA president is selectively enforcing rules — my slightly long grass gets a fine, but their friend's yard full of junk is ignored. What recourse do I have?
My neighbor keeps using my wi-fi somehow and when I changed the password and told them to get their own, they started being hostile. Now they blast music whenever they see me in my yard.
My best friend of 15 years told my deepest secret to a group of people at a party. I'm heartbroken and don't know if I can ever trust them again.
A friend borrowed $2,000 from me eight months ago and keeps making excuses about paying it back. Now they posted vacation photos on social media. I feel used.
My friend group planned a trip and deliberately excluded me. I only found out because someone accidentally posted about it. Should I say something or just let the friendship fade?
I found out my close friend has been talking badly about me behind my back for months. Multiple people have told me. When I brought it up, they denied everything.
My friend keeps canceling plans with me at the last minute but then hangs out with other people. I've confronted them and they just say they were tired. I feel like I'm being replaced.
A friend copied my business idea after I confided in them. They launched the same concept two months before I could. I'm absolutely livid.
My roommate and supposed friend hasn't paid their share of rent for two months and keeps saying they'll get to it. I'm covering everything and it's draining my savings.
I helped a friend move, lent them furniture, and supported them through a breakup. Now that I need help moving, they suddenly can't make it. Nobody in my friend group offered.
My friend told my ex personal things about my new relationship, and now my ex is using that information to harass me. I'm so angry and feel completely betrayed.
A close friend went behind my back and applied for the same job I told them I was interviewing for. They got it. They claim they didn't know, but I literally showed them the posting.
My friend borrowed my car and returned it with a big dent. They swear it was already there. It definitely was not. I have photos from before I lent it to them.
I organized and paid for a friend's surprise birthday party, and they publicly thanked everyone except me. When I mentioned it, they said I was being oversensitive.
My friend keeps making passive-aggressive comments about my weight in front of other people and calls it 'just joking.' It's humiliating and I want it to stop.
A friend invited themselves to stay at my place for 'a few days' and it's been three weeks. They eat my food, don't clean up, and get offended when I hint they should leave.
My childhood best friend chose my ex as their maid of honor over me. She knows what my ex did to me. I don't know if I can even attend the wedding.

My mother constantly criticizes my parenting in front of my kids. Last Thanksgiving she told my daughter that mommy doesn't know how to cook properly. How do I set boundaries without ruining the relationship?
My parents changed their will to give almost everything to my sibling and barely anything to me, even though I'm the one who's been taking care of them for years. I'm gutted.

My sister has always been the favorite child. She gets financial help, praise, and support, while I get criticism. I just found out my parents paid for her house deposit and never told me. What should I do?
My in-laws constantly undermine my decisions about my own children. They give the kids sugar after I've said no, let them stay up late, and tell them 'your parent is too strict.' I'm at my limit.
My brother hasn't spoken to me in two years because I couldn't attend his destination wedding due to finances. He won't return my calls or texts. How do I fix this?
My father publicly humiliated me at a family gathering by bringing up my past failures in front of everyone. He said he was 'just being honest.' I left in tears.
My cousin posted embarrassing childhood photos of me on social media without my permission and refuses to take them down. They say I'm overreacting. Am I?
My mother-in-law keeps making snide comments about how I'm not good enough for her child. My partner says I'm imagining it. I'm not imagining it.
My sibling borrowed a family heirloom and 'lost' it. I suspect they sold it. They won't admit anything and my parents are taking their side. I'm furious and hurt.
My dad promised to help with my college tuition, then backed out at the last minute to buy a boat. He says I should take out loans like everyone else. I had planned my finances around his promise.
My family keeps inviting my abusive ex to holiday gatherings because 'they're practically family too.' When I object, they say I'm being dramatic and need to move on.
My aunt spread a malicious lie about me at a family reunion and now half the family won't talk to me. She admitted privately she made it up but won't tell anyone the truth.
My parents keep comparing me unfavorably to my more successful sibling in every conversation. 'Why can't you be more like your brother?' I'm 35 and still hearing this.
My sister told me she doesn't want my kids at her child-free wedding, but she's allowing our other sibling's children. When I asked why, she said my kids are 'too wild.'
My elderly mother gave my manipulative brother power of attorney and he's been spending her money on himself. I have evidence but she refuses to believe me.
Someone cut in front of me in a long grocery store line and when I said something, they told me to shut up. The cashier saw it and didn't do anything. How would you handle this?
A stranger road-raged at me today, followed me for several blocks honking and screaming, because I merged legally in front of them. I'm shaken up. What should I have done?
A waiter was incredibly rude to me for no reason — rolled their eyes when I asked a question, slammed my plate down, and ignored me for 20 minutes. Should I have said something to the manager?
Someone at the gym keeps using the equipment I'm clearly in the middle of using when I step away for water. When I politely pointed out I was still using it, they told me I don't own the place.

A person at a coffee shop took the drink the barista made for me, realized it was wrong, and just left it on the counter half-drunk. The barista said I have to wait for a new one. Am I wrong for being annoyed?
Someone let their kid kick the back of my seat on a 5-hour flight. I asked them twice to stop and they said 'he's just a child.' The flight attendant asked me to be understanding. I'm frustrated.
A stranger screamed at me in a parking lot because they thought I took 'their' spot, even though it was a public lot with no assigned spaces. They keyed my car while I was in the store.
I held the door open for someone and they walked right through without acknowledging me, then let the next door slam in my face. Petty, I know, but it made me irrationally angry.
A delivery driver threw my package over the fence and it broke. The company says it was delivered so they won't replace it. The driver denies throwing it despite video evidence.
Someone at a public pool deliberately splashed my toddler in the face and laughed when she cried. When I confronted them they said it's a pool and people get wet. I was livid.
Someone is impersonating me online, creating fake profiles with my photos and sending horrible messages to my contacts. I've reported it but nothing happens. I feel helpless.

A person I sold something to online left a fake one-star review saying the item was broken, even though I have messages where they said they loved it. They're trying to get a refund while keeping the item.
I got scammed by someone selling concert tickets online. They seemed so legit. Is there any way to get my money back or should I just accept the loss?
My ex is posting manipulated screenshots of our private conversations online to make me look terrible. They've taken things completely out of context. What can I do?
Someone keeps leaving hateful anonymous comments on everything I post on social media. I'm pretty sure I know who it is. Should I call them out publicly?
A former client left a completely false one-star review of my small business because I wouldn't give them a discount. It's hurting my livelihood. How do I handle this?
An influencer with a huge following publicly mocked my small Etsy shop and now I'm getting harassed by their fans. My sales have dropped. Is there any legal recourse?
Someone hacked my gaming account that I've spent years building and the platform support says there's nothing they can do. I'm devastated. Any suggestions?
A person in my online community keeps plagiarizing my work and posting it as their own. The moderators say they can't prove it even though I have timestamps showing I posted first.
I got doxxed after posting a mild political opinion online. People are sending threats to my home address. I'm scared. What steps should I take right now?
My health insurance denied a claim for a procedure my doctor said was medically necessary. I've been paying premiums for years and now they won't cover the one thing I actually need. What can I do?
My bank charged me $200 in overdraft fees because of their own processing error. They admitted the error but say the fees are 'automatically generated' and can't be reversed. That can't be right.
I returned a product within the return window and the store is refusing to give me a refund, claiming it was 'used.' It was defective out of the box. I feel like I'm being cheated.
My landlord is refusing to return my $3,000 security deposit, claiming damages that existed before I moved in. I have photos from move-in day proving the damage was pre-existing.
A mechanic charged me $1,500 for repairs I didn't authorize. They said they 'had to do it' once they opened the engine but never called me to approve the work.
My university is charging me for a semester I withdrew from within the allowed period. They keep giving me the runaround between departments. I can't afford this.
I've been paying for a gym membership I can't cancel. Their cancellation process is intentionally impossible — you can only cancel in person during hours they know most people work.
A contractor I hired did terrible work on my kitchen, disappeared halfway through, and is now threatening to put a lien on my house if I don't pay the full amount. What are my rights?
My car insurance raised my rates by 40% after an accident that was clearly the other driver's fault. Their driver admitted fault at the scene. How do I fight this?
I was wrongly given a parking ticket. I have evidence I paid for parking, but the city's appeals process is a joke — they denied my appeal without even looking at my evidence.
I just found out my partner has been lying about their finances for our entire relationship. They have massive debt they hid from me and we just bought a house together. I feel completely betrayed.
My partner's ex keeps inserting themselves into our relationship, and my partner won't set boundaries. They text constantly and my partner says I'm being jealous. Am I wrong here?
I caught my partner going through my phone and reading my private messages with my therapist. When I confronted them, they turned it around and said I must be hiding something.
My partner makes fun of me in front of their friends and dismisses my feelings when I bring it up later. They say I need to learn to take a joke. It's wearing me down.
I found out my partner told their family extremely private things about our relationship problems. Now their whole family treats me differently. I feel so exposed.
My ex is using our kids as pawns to punish me after our divorce. They cancel my visitation at the last minute and tell the kids I don't want to see them. I'm heartbroken.
My partner promised to split household duties equally but does almost nothing. When I bring it up, they say I have higher standards and should just lower them. I'm exhausted.
I discovered that my partner has been emotionally cheating with a coworker for months. They say nothing physical happened so it doesn't count. I feel shattered.
My partner agreed we'd save for a house, but I just found out they've been secretly spending our joint savings on expensive hobbies. They spent almost $8,000 without telling me.
After our breakup, my ex is refusing to return my belongings including things with sentimental value. They say if I want them back I need to 'earn' them. I just want my stuff.
